# PowerShell aliases cannot include arguments, so path-changing shortcuts use
# the "jump" directive and are materialized as functions by setup.ps1.
alias b build.py
alias g git
jump j.root .
jump j.build build
jump j.dev dev
jump j.bin dev\bin
jump j.env dev\env
jump j.src src
jump j.vkfwd src\vkfwd
jump j.test src\vkfwd\ferry\test
